text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year! Here's to another great year
together!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Heh, as energetic as always. It sure is reassuring
having you by my side.
choice_data_list: Do you have any New Year's resolutions?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Of course... To win the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I wanna keep making strides toward that goal.
So... what's our first race gonna be?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I resist the urge to comment on her impatience,
since I myself spent the New Year break
contemplating our future plans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Arima Kinen is a race that a only a select few
have the honor to join. In order to participate, an
Umamusume must be chosen by her fans.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As such, it's vital that Oguri Cap attract more
fans and steadily build up her track record in G1
races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So I reply...
choice_data_list:
Why don't we start with your strongest
distance?

Why don't we start with your strongest
distance?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
My strongest distance, huh? Well, if I had to
choose, I guess it'd be sprints. I ran those pretty
often back home.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Either that, or miles. Actually, yeah. I'm probably
better at running miles.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I'll be able to impress everyone in a mile
race!
choice_data_list: Let's show everyone just how great you are.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We decide that Oguri Cap should start by running
the distances she's best at, then build from there.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: So our next goal is... the NHK Mile Cup!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, what should we do for our first training
session of the year?
choice_data_list:
Let's eat a big meal to start the year on a
healthy note!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hrm... Going to the gym right after New Year's
break?
choice_data_list: Let's get this year off to a strong start!
Let's get this year off to a strong start!

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... I'm detecting a hint of wishful thinking
there. But fine, let's go train.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
I have one condition though—that I get to eat
once we're done. Food's a necessity when it
comes to building strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Oguri Cap and I head to the gym for an intensive
workout, then go out to eat. Her post-workout
meal more than makes up for the energy burned.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: What?! Are you being serious?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Is it really okay for me to eat?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
Thanks so much! To be honest, I was kinda
worried about what you were gonna say.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
There are so many delicious things to eat for New
Year's... It'd be horrible if I didn't get to have any
of it.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I feel much better now. Come on. Let's make
the most of all the yummy stuff New Year's has to
offer and eat our fill!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some things are better left unsaid, and the
amount Oguri Cap eats is one of them—but at
least it will help her start the year on a healthy
note.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Some new skills?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
But I'm always so clumsy. Do you really think I can
learn something new?
choice_data_list: You've got plenty of time to practice.

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. The year's only just started after
all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Clumsy though she may be, Oguri Cap makes it
clear that she's still determined to take on new
challenges. I'm certain that she'll be able to polish
her techniques.
